about.description: AbbVie's India footprint covers Bengaluru, spanning R&D. The centers deliver R&D and ER&D and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all thirteen decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does AbbVie operate in India?
faq.a: AbbVie operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does AbbVie have GCC centers in?
faq.a: AbbVie's India GCC presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does AbbVie run in India?
faq.a: AbbVie runs R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at AbbVie's India GCCs?
faq.a: AbbVie's India centers employ in the 101 to 200 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads AbbVie's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 13 leaders at AbbVie's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
